name: Cepe Consomme
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the homemade, clear chicken stock into a saucepan and heat gently.
2. While heating the stock, wash the dried cepes in a sieve.
3. Add the cepes to the heated stock.
4. When the mixture reaches a boil, reduce the heat to a very gentle simmer without covering the pan.
5. Allow the consomme to simmer until it reduces to about 2/3 of its original volume.
6. Strain the liquid and let it settle; the cepes may release some sand during straining.
7. When ready to serve, decant the strained liquid from the sediment, reheat, and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
8. Optionally, add a tablespoon of Dry Madeira before serving.
